description: Security and CSP documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe
purpose: Provide comprehensive security and Content Security Policy documentation for secure extension development

documents.title: CSP Nonce Guide

categories.name: webview_security

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from OWASP, MDN Web Docs, and reputable security resources. Prioritize OWASP and MDN documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: guide_name.html, prevention_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize OWASP and MDN documentation.
instructions.securityFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) implement CSP correctly, (2) use nonce-based security for webviews, (3) prevent XSS attacks, (4) prevent CSRF attacks, (5) follow webview security best practices.
